mapper.select: SELECT id, business_domain_id, code, name, status_flow_config FROM ticket_type WHERE business_domain_id = #{domainId} ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT id, business_domain_id, code, name, status_flow_config FROM ticket_type WHERE id = #{id} AND business_domain_id = #{domainId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ticket_type ( business_domain_id, code, name, status_flow_config, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{businessDomainId}, #{code}, #{name}, #{statusFlowConfig}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3), CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3) )
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM ticket_type WHERE id = #{id} AND business_domain_id = #{domainId}
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM ticket_type WHERE business_domain_id = #{domainId} ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT 1
